[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110011100 6
1 0111100101 6
2 0001001101 4
3 0110100101 5
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 1101100010 5
7 1111111010 8
